metadata.title: Mithril Snapshot UX Refinement Tasks
metadata.description: Decompose MithrilBootstrap into sub-components, add stepper UX, download metadata, stage-specific errors, theme variables (via theme-management skill tooling), i18n (via i18n-messaging skill conventions), Storybook coverage (via storybook-creation skill), and E2E tests (via e2e-test-creation skill)

phases.name: Backend Type & Pipeline Extensions
phases.description: Extend shared types and backend progress pipeline to carry file counts and error stage

tasks.title: Extend shared types
tasks.description: Add filesDownloaded, filesTotal to MithrilBootstrapStatusUpdate and stage to MithrilBootstrapError in source/common/types/mithril-bootstrap.types.ts

tasks.title: Update mithrilProgress parser
tasks.description: Extend MithrilProgressUpdate and parseMithrilProgressUpdate to preserve raw files_downloaded and files_total instead of only converting to percentage

tasks.title: Update MithrilBootstrapService progress
tasks.description: In _downloadSnapshot(), include filesDownloaded and filesTotal from progress update in _updateStatus() call. Annotate errors with stage: 'download' | 'verify' | 'convert'

tasks.title: Annotate node-start failure stage
tasks.description: In handleDiskSpace.ts where _updateStatus({ status: 'failed' }) is called for node-start failures, set error.stage to 'node-start'

tasks.title: Update backend unit tests
tasks.description: Extend MithrilBootstrapService.spec.ts to verify filesDownloaded/filesTotal preservation and stage annotation on errors

phases.name: Store & Container Updates
phases.description: Extend MobX store with download metadata observables and computed properties

tasks.title: Add store observables and computeds
tasks.description: Add @observable filesDownloaded, filesTotal and @computed bytesDownloaded, throughputBps to MithrilBootstrapStore. Update _updateStatus action to assign file count fields

tasks.title: Update MithrilBootstrapPage container
tasks.description: Pass new store observables (filesDownloaded, filesTotal, bytesDownloaded, throughputBps) through to the component

phases.name: i18n Message Extraction
phases.description: Extract and extend i18n messages before component decomposition. Follow i18n-messaging skill conventions.

tasks.title: Extract i18n messages file
tasks.description: Create MithrilBootstrap.messages.ts using defineMessages() with all 19 existing entries plus ~8 new messages for stage-specific error titles/hints, download metadata labels, and step indicator labels. Conventions: (1) Message IDs use 'mithril.bootstrap.<messageKey>' dot-separated format, (2) all defaultMessage values prefixed with '!!!', (3) every message includes 'description' field for translators, (4) placeholders use {variableName} syntax documented in description

tasks.title: Run i18n manage workflow
tasks.description: Run 'yarn i18n:manage' (combines extract + check) to sync translations and validate across en-US and ja-JP locales. Verify updated files: translations/messages.json, source/renderer/app/i18n/locales/en-US.json, source/renderer/app/i18n/locales/ja-JP.json. Do NOT run i18n:extract separately — i18n:manage includes it.

phases.name: Component Decomposition
phases.description: Break monolithic MithrilBootstrap.tsx into focused sub-components

tasks.title: Implement MithrilStepIndicator
tasks.description: New component modeled on SyncingProgress.tsx with 4 steps (preparing, downloading, verifying, finalizing), spinner/checkmark/pending states, and download metadata display

tasks.title: Implement MithrilSnapshotSelector
tasks.description: Extract and improve snapshot dropdown with truncated digest labels ({first8}...{last8}), locale-aware dates, and formatted size in option labels

tasks.title: Implement MithrilSnapshotDetails
tasks.description: Extract metadata grid (digest, date, size, node version) into dedicated component with truncated digest display

tasks.title: Implement MithrilErrorView
tasks.description: Stage-specific error screens with contextual titles/hints for download, verify, convert, node-start, and generic stages. Collapsible error code details and log path link

tasks.title: Implement MithrilProgressView
tasks.description: Compose MithrilStepIndicator + ProgressBarLarge + timing metadata + cancel button. Show bytesDownloaded/bytesTotal and throughput during download step

tasks.title: Implement MithrilDecisionView
tasks.description: Extract decision screen with title, description, MithrilSnapshotSelector, MithrilSnapshotDetails, and accept/decline buttons

tasks.title: Slim down root MithrilBootstrap.tsx
tasks.description: Reduce to overlay chrome (backdrop + centered card) + view delegation based on status. Create index.ts re-export

phases.name: Theming & Styling
phases.description: Migrate hardcoded colors to CSS theme variables using theme-management skill tooling. Do NOT manually edit theme output files.

tasks.title: Migrate SCSS to theme variables
tasks.description: Replace all hardcoded backdrop/card/text/button colors in MithrilBootstrap.scss and new SCSS files with --theme-mithril-* CSS custom properties. Follow naming pattern: --theme-mithril-[element]-[property]

tasks.title: Add theme variables to createTheme
tasks.description: Add --theme-mithril-card-background, --theme-mithril-text-color, --theme-mithril-text-secondary, --theme-mithril-button-primary-background, etc. to createTheme in source/renderer/app/themes/utils/constants.ts with both 'light' and 'dark' values. Do NOT manually edit theme output files (cardano.ts, light-blue.ts, etc.)

tasks.title: Run theme validation and update
tasks.description: Run 'yarn themes:check:createTheme' to validate consistency between createTheme and theme output files. Then run 'yarn themes:update' to propagate new --theme-mithril-* variables to ALL theme files automatically. Verify with 'yarn prettier:check && yarn compile'

tasks.title: Regenerate SCSS type definitions
tasks.description: Run 'yarn typedef:sass' after all SCSS changes to regenerate .scss.d.ts files for new modules

phases.name: Accessibility & Storybook
phases.description: Add a11y attributes and full Storybook coverage using storybook-creation skill conventions

tasks.title: Add accessibility attributes
tasks.description: Add role='progressbar' with aria-valuenow/min/max, aria-live='polite' on step indicator, aria-label on buttons and Select, ensure keyboard navigability

tasks.title: Create Storybook stories
tasks.description: Create storybook/stories/loading/MithrilBootstrap.stories.tsx with 12 stories using storiesOf('Loading / Mithril Bootstrap', module) API (NOT CSF). Use StoryDecorator for theme + withKnobs for interactive props. Cover states: Decision (Loading, With Snapshots, Specific Snapshot), Progress (Preparing, Downloading early/mid, Verifying, Finalizing), Error (Download, Verify, Convert, Node Start). Import component via relative path from source/renderer/app/components/loading/mithril-bootstrap/

tasks.title: Register stories in barrel file
tasks.description: Create storybook/stories/loading/ domain directory. Add "import './loading/MithrilBootstrap.stories'" to storybook/stories/index.ts barrel file under a '// Loading' comment section. Verify story appears in Storybook navigation.

phases.name: E2E Tests
phases.description: Create Cucumber BDD end-to-end tests for Mithril bootstrap flow using e2e-test-creation skill conventions

tasks.title: Create E2E feature file
tasks.description: Create tests/mithril/e2e/features/mithril-bootstrap.feature with @e2e tag. Include Background with basic setup, then scenarios for: (1) Decision screen displays with snapshot selector, (2) User accepts bootstrap and enters progress, (3) User declines bootstrap, (4) Progress stages advance through stepper, (5) Error screen displays stage-specific messaging, (6) Cancel during progress. Use daedalus.stores.mithrilBootstrap to set state since real bootstrap requires cardano-node.

tasks.title: Write E2E step definitions
tasks.description: Create tests/mithril/e2e/steps/mithril-bootstrap.ts with: (1) SELECTORS const grouping all CSS class selectors matching SCSS module output (e.g., '.MithrilBootstrap_component', '.MithrilDecisionView_acceptButton'), (2) async function step definitions (not arrow functions), (3) Chai expect assertions, (4) this.client.execute() for setting store state, (5) this.waitAndClick() and this.client.waitForVisible() for DOM interaction.

phases.name: Verification
phases.description: Run all checks and verify correctness including theme validation, i18n validation, and storybook rendering

tasks.title: Run verification suite
tasks.description: Run full verification: (1) yarn compile — no TS errors, (2) yarn lint — clean, (3) yarn prettier:check — clean, (4) yarn themes:check:createTheme — all mithril theme vars consistent across themes, (5) yarn i18n:manage — all messages extracted and validated for en-US/ja-JP, (6) yarn test:jest — unit tests pass, (7) yarn storybook — all 12 stories render correctly, (8) yarn typedef:sass — SCSS types up to date
